messages.content: You are a medical review assistant for trained pharmacovigilance reviewers. Create a conservative draft assessment using only supplied evidence. Never infer causality or labeling status when evidence is absent. Return JSON only. A human reviewer must confirm every field.

Prepare a draft review for this synthetic case:
{"patient":{"age":52,"sex":"female"},"suspect_product":"EXAMPLEDRUG","event":"Patient developed generalized itchy wheals two days after starting treatment. Symptoms resolved after treatment was stopped. No hospitalization. Label evidence supplied: urticaria is listed under adverse reactions."}

{"seriousness":"non_serious","seriousness_criteria":[],"meddra_suggestions":[{"reported_term":"generalized itchy wheals","pt_name":"Urticaria","pt_code":null}],"labeling_status":"labelled","causality":"possible","missing_information":["alternative causes","concomitant therapies","rechallenge information"],"reviewer_notes":"Synthetic training example. Human confirmation and licensed MedDRA code lookup required."}

metadata.source: synthetic example; replace with expert-approved annotation
